message:
docs(connectors): harmonize implementation guide with round 3 spec

Provenance & Labels:
- Update Provenance struct with integrity_label/confidentiality_label
- Add LabelAdjustment enum for elevation and declassification
- Add SanitizerReceipt struct for proof-carrying taint reductions
- Add effective_integrity(), effective_confidentiality() methods
- Add security-critical merge() with MIN/MAX rule

Object Model:
- Add foreign_refs to ObjectHeader for cross-zone refs (no GC effect)
- Add DeviceSelector enum for typed placement selectors
- Change ObjectPlacementPolicy to use basis points instead of floats
- Replace resource_uris with resource_object_ids
- Add ResourceObject struct definition

Protocol Updates:
- Add FCPC control-plane framing section with FcpcFrame struct
- Add session rekey triggers (rekey_after_seconds, rekey_after_bytes)
- Add RevocationFreshnessPolicy enum for offline handling

Conformance:
- Add fuzzing requirements section for fcp-conformance crate
- Define fuzz targets: FCPS, handshake, CapabilityToken, ZoneKeyManifest

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
